data.body: Patchset 7 pushed to change #664 with the findings #4+#5 Option B (era-at-storage-anchor) remediation: era key-validity now anchored on the cert's storage anchor S (introducing commit of the SIGNATURE event, gate-resolved, fail-closed) instead of the self-chosen merged_log_commit; trust-config era boundaries moved to tickets-branch log positions (added_at_log_position/revoked_at_log_position) with a new 'rebar trusted-env add|revoke' helper; shared era rule extracted to authorship.keys_valid_at_anchor. Held-out rollback regression (test_opcert_rollback_heldout.py) proves a revoked-key backdated cert FAILs and a not-revoked control PASSes; mutation check confirms teeth. Local make lint/typecheck/test all green. Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified re-vote on PS7.
